logger.doc:name: Log Payment Processing Start
logger.message: Starting payment processing | PaymentId: #[vars.paymentId] | OrderId: #[vars.paymentRequest.orderId] | Amount: #[vars.paymentRequest.amount] #[vars.paymentRequest.currency default 'USD'] | CorrelationId: #[correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log Authorization Result
logger.message: Payment authorization result: #[vars.authorizationResponse.status] | AuthCode: #[vars.authorizationResponse.authorizationCode default 'N/A'] | PaymentId: #[vars.paymentId]

logger.doc:name: Log Authorization Success
logger.message: Payment authorized. Proceeding to capture | PaymentId: #[vars.paymentId]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { authorizationCode: vars.authorizationResponse.authorizationCode, paymentId: vars.paymentId, orderId: vars.paymentRequest.orderId, amount: vars.paymentRequest.amount, currency: vars.paymentRequest.currency default "USD", captureType: "FULL", capturedAt: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, metadata: { correlationId: correlationId, source: "order-orchestration-papi" } }

logger.doc:name: Log Capture Result
logger.message: Payment captured successfully | CaptureId: #[vars.captureResponse.captureId default 'N/A'] | PaymentId: #[vars.paymentId]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { paymentId: vars.paymentId, paymentStatus: "CAPTURED", authorizationCode: vars.authorizationResponse.authorizationCode, captureId: vars.captureResponse.captureId default "", amount: vars.paymentRequest.amount, currency: vars.paymentRequest.currency default "USD", paymentMethod: vars.paymentRequest.paymentMethod default "CREDIT_CARD", paidAt: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"} }

logger.doc:name: Log Order Updated
logger.message: Order updated with payment reference | OrderId: #[vars.paymentRequest.orderId] | PaymentId: #[vars.paymentId]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { eventType: "payment-received", eventId: uuid(), timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, correlationId: correlationId, data: { paymentId: vars.paymentId, orderId: vars.paymentRequest.orderId, customerId: vars.paymentRequest.customerId default "", amount: vars.paymentRequest.amount, currency: vars.paymentRequest.currency default "USD", status: "CAPTURED", paymentMethod: vars.paymentRequest.paymentMethod default "CREDIT_CARD" } }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, errorCode: "PAYMENT_RETRY_EXHAUSTED", message: "Payment processing failed after multiple attempts. Please try again later.", paymentId: vars.paymentId, orderId: vars.paymentRequest.orderId default "", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"} }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, errorCode: "PAYMENT_PROCESSING_FAILED", message: "An error occurred during payment processing.", detail: error.description default "Unknown payment error", paymentId: vars.paymentId, orderId: vars.paymentRequest.orderId default "", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"} }
